page.title: Inventory
columns.title: Columns
columns.selectTypeHint: Select a card type to see available columns.
filter.title: Filters
filter.mineStakeholder: Only cards I'm a stakeholder on
filter.mineStakeholderHint: Restrict the list to cards where you hold at least one stakeholder role.
massEdit.title: Mass Edit
massEdit.partialSummary: {{succeeded}} updated, {{blocked}} blocked. Resolve the items below and retry.
massEdit.rel.addHint_one: Each of the selected card will be linked to every {{type}} chosen above. Existing links are kept.
massEdit.rel.addHint_other: Each of the {{count}} selected cards will be linked to every {{type}} chosen above. Existing links are kept.
massEdit.rel.removeHint_one: Any matching link between the selected card and the {{type}} chosen above will be removed.
massEdit.rel.removeHint_other: Any matching link between the {{count}} selected cards and the {{type}} chosen above will be removed.
massEdit.rel.noTargetsSelected: Select at least one card to link to.
massEdit.rel.nothingToAdd: Every selected card is already linked to the chosen targets.
massEdit.rel.nothingToRemove: None of the selected cards are linked to the chosen targets.
massEdit.tags.addHint_one: The selected card will be tagged with every tag chosen above. Existing tags are kept.
massEdit.tags.addHint_other: Each of the {{count}} selected cards will be tagged with every tag chosen above. Existing tags are kept.
massEdit.tags.removeHint_one: Any matching tag will be removed from the selected card.
massEdit.tags.removeHint_other: Any matching tag will be removed from the {{count}} selected cards.
massArchive.confirmMessage_one: Are you sure you want to archive {{count}} card? Archived cards can be restored within {{days}} days.
massArchive.confirmMessage_other: Are you sure you want to archive {{count}} cards? Archived cards can be restored within {{days}} days.
massArchive.confirmMessageIndefinite_one: Are you sure you want to archive {{count}} card? Archived cards can be restored at any time and are kept indefinitely.
massArchive.confirmMessageIndefinite_oth: Are you sure you want to archive {{count}} cards? Archived cards can be restored at any time and are kept indefinitely.
massArchive.cascadeHelp: Each affected card's descendants are archived together.
massArchive.cascadeRelatedToggle: Also archive cards linked via relationships
massArchive.cascadeRelatedHelp: Every direct peer card of each selected card is archived too. Use with care.
massDelete.confirmMessage_one: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {{count}} card? All related data (relations, comments, documents, etc.) will also be deleted.
massDelete.confirmMessage_other: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {{count}} cards? All related data (relations, comments, documents, etc.) will also be deleted.
massDelete.cascadeRelatedToggle: Also delete cards linked via relationships
massDelete.cascadeRelatedHelp: Every direct peer card of each selected card is permanently deleted too. Use with care.
massRestore.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to restore {{count}} archived cards back to active?
views.title: Views
views.saveActiveFilters_one: This will save your current {{count}} active filter.
views.saveActiveFilters_other: This will save your current {{count}} active filters.
views.permissionsHint: Permissions (shared users can view by default)
import.title: Import Cards
import.parseError: Failed to parse the file. Make sure it is a valid .xlsx or .xls file.
import.dropOrBrowse: Drop an Excel file here or click to browse
import.tipDescription: Export your current inventory first to get a template with the correct column format and card IDs.
import.errors.noDataRows: The file contains no data rows
import.errors.missingTypeColumn: Missing required column: type (or select a single type filter before importing)
import.errors.noExistingCard: Row {{row}}: no existing card with id "{{id}}"
import.errors.typeMismatch: Row {{row}}: type mismatch — file has "{{fileType}}", existing has "{{existingType}}"
import.errors.parentNotFound: Row {{row}}: parent_id "{{parentId}}" not found — must reference an existing card, a row in this file, or use the parent_path column instead
import.errors.invalidParentPath: Row {{row}}: parent path "{{path}}" couldn't be resolved — no card with that ancestry exists in this instance or in the file
import.errors.invalidApprovalStatus: Row {{row}}: invalid approval_status "{{status}}" (valid: DRAFT, APPROVED, BROKEN, REJECTED)
import.warnings.unrecognisedColumn: Column "{{column}}" is not recognised and will be ignored
import.warnings.idNotFoundCreating: Row {{row}}: id "{{id}}" doesn't exist in this instance — creating as a new card
import.warnings.ambiguousParentPath: Row {{row}}: parent path "{{path}}" matches multiple cards — using the first match
import.warnings.readOnlyFieldIgnored: Row {{row}}: "{{field}}" is a read-only field — value will be ignored
import.formatVersionBanner: This file was exported with a different workbook format (version {{version}}). Review the diff carefully before applying.
import.errors.relationTargetMissing: Relation target "{{ref}}" ({{type}}) doesn't match any card
import.warnings.formatVersionMismatch: Workbook format version {{version}} differs from the current version. Some fields may not round-trip cleanly.
